title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce platform with real-time inventory management and payment processing
shortDescription: Full-stack e-commerce solution with payment integration
details: Built a scalable e-commerce platform using FastAPI backend with MongoDB for flexible data storage. Implemented AWS S3 for product image management and Docker for containerization. The frontend uses React for a responsive UI.

title: Mobile Fitness App
description: iOS fitness tracking application with real-time data sync and cloud storage
details: Developed a native iOS app in Swift for fitness tracking with real-time cloud sync using AWS Amplify. Implemented serverless backend with Python Lambda functions and DynamoDB for data persistence.

title: Analytics Dashboard
description: Real-time analytics dashboard for business metrics and data visualization
details: Created a high-performance analytics dashboard using React with real-time data updates via WebSockets. Backend built with Node.js, PostgreSQL for data storage, and Redis for caching. Deployed on AWS EC2 with Docker.
